const q = { chat_id: $input.first().json.chat_id, filters: $input.first().json.filters || {} };
const f = q.filters || {};
const poi_required = Array.isArray(f.poi_required) ? f.poi_required : [];

/** Всегда показываем ровно до 3 объявлений: дешёвое, среднее, дорогое (если есть цены). */
const PICK = 3;

function fnFilter(v) {
  if (v == null || v === '') return null;
  const n = Number(v);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
}
const price_min = fnFilter(f.price_min);
const price_max = fnFilter(f.price_max);
const min_area = fnFilter(f.min_area);
const max_area = fnFilter(f.max_area);
const floor_min = fnFilter(f.floor_min);
const floor_max = fnFilter(f.floor_max);
const wantRooms = Array.isArray(f.rooms)
  ? f.rooms.map((r) => Number(r)).filter((x) => Number.isFinite(x) && x >= 0 && x <= 9)
  : [];

function n(v){
  if (v == null) return null;
  const s = String(v).replace(/\u00A0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,'').replace(',', '.');
  const x = Number(s.replace(/[^\d.-]/g,''));
  return Number.isFinite(x) ? x : null;
}
function parseFloor(v){
  const s = String(v || '');
  const m = s.match(/(\d{1,2})\s*\/\s*(\d{1,2})/);
  if (m) return { floor: Number(m[1]), total: Number(m[2]) };
  const one = s.match(/\b(\d{1,2})\b/);
  return { floor: one ? Number(one[1]) : null, total: null };
}
function norm(s){ return String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/ё/g,'е'); }

const out = [];
for (const r of DATASET) {
  const roomsRaw = n(r['КОМНАТЫ']);
  const rooms = roomsRaw == null ? null : Math.round(roomsRaw);
  const area  = n(r['ПЛОЩАДЬ']);
  const price = n(r['ЦЕНА']);
  const district = norm(r['РАЙОН']);
  const address  = String(r['АДРЕС'] || '').trim();
  const url = String(r['ССЫЛКА'] || '').trim();
  const fl = parseFloor(r['ЭТАЖ']);

  if (!url) continue;
  if (wantRooms.length) {
    if (rooms == null || !wantRooms.includes(rooms)) continue;
  }
  if (price_min != null && price_min > 0) {
    if (price == null || price < price_min) continue;
  }
  if (price_max != null && price_max > 0) {
    if (price == null || price > price_max) continue;
  }
  if (min_area != null && min_area > 0) {
    if (area == null || area < min_area) continue;
  }
  if (max_area != null && max_area > 0) {
    if (area == null || area > max_area) continue;
  }
  if (floor_min != null && floor_min > 0) {
    if (fl.floor == null || fl.floor < floor_min) continue;
  }
  if (floor_max != null && floor_max > 0) {
    if (fl.floor == null || fl.floor > floor_max) continue;
  }
  if (f.not_first && fl.floor === 1) continue;
  if (f.not_last  && fl.floor != null && fl.total != null && fl.floor === fl.total) continue;
  if (f.districts?.length) {
    const ok = f.districts.some(d => district.includes(d));
    if (!ok) continue;
  }
  if (f.streetHints?.length) {
    const addrNorm = norm(address);
    const ok = f.streetHints.some(h => addrNorm.includes(norm(h)));
    if (!ok) continue;
  }

  let score = 0;
  if (price_max != null && price_max > 0 && price != null) {
    score += Math.max(0, 1 - (price_max - price) / Math.max(price_max, 1));
  }
  if (price_min != null && price_min > 0 && price != null) {
    score += Math.min(0.5, (price - price_min) / Math.max(price_min, 1) * 0.15);
  }
  if (wantRooms.length && rooms != null) score += wantRooms.includes(rooms) ? 1.2 : 0;
  if (min_area != null && min_area > 0 && area != null) {
    score += area >= min_area ? 0.5 : 0;
    score += Math.min(0.4, (area - min_area) / Math.max(min_area, 1) * 0.2);
  }
  if (max_area != null && max_area > 0 && area != null && min_area != null && min_area > 0) {
    const mid = (min_area + max_area) / 2;
    const span = Math.max(max_area - min_area, 1);
    score += Math.max(0, 0.35 - Math.abs(area - mid) / span * 0.35);
  } else if (max_area != null && max_area > 0 && area != null) {
    score += area <= max_area ? 0.35 : 0;
  }
  if (floor_min != null && floor_min > 0 && fl.floor != null) {
    score += fl.floor >= floor_min ? 0.25 : 0;
  }
  if (floor_max != null && floor_max > 0 && fl.floor != null) {
    score += fl.floor <= floor_max ? 0.25 : 0;
  }
  if (f.districts?.length) score += 0.5;

  out.push({
    chat_id: q.chat_id,
    rooms, area_m2: area, floor: fl.floor, floor_total: fl.total,
    address, url, price_rub: price,
    district: r['РАЙОН'] || '',
    score,
    poi_required
  });
}

if (!out.length) {
  return [{ json: { chat_id: q.chat_id, no_results: true, text: '😔 По вашему запросу ничего не найдено.\n\nСмягчите условия: шире площадь или этаж, другой район/улица, или уберите часть фильтров.' } }];
}
out.sort((a,b) => b.score - a.score);

let toSend = out;
if (out.length > PICK) {
  const priced = out.filter(x => x.price_rub != null && Number.isFinite(x.price_rub));
  if (priced.length >= PICK) {
    const byP = [...priced].sort((a,b) => a.price_rub - b.price_rub);
    const n = byP.length;
    const cheap = byP[0];
    const mid = byP[Math.floor(n / 2)];
    const costly = byP[n - 1];
    const seen = new Set();
    toSend = [];
    for (const x of [cheap, mid, costly]) {
      if (x && x.url && !seen.has(x.url)) { seen.add(x.url); toSend.push(x); }
    }
    for (const x of out) {
      if (toSend.length >= PICK) break;
      if (x && x.url && !seen.has(x.url)) { seen.add(x.url); toSend.push(x); }
    }
    toSend = toSend.slice(0, PICK);
  } else {
    toSend = out.slice(0, PICK);
  }
}

return toSend.map(x => ({ json: x }));
